mission.title: keycloak: Refresh token rotation with multiple tabs
mission.description: Refresh token rotation with multiple tabs. This issue affects 78+ users.

steps.title: Identify keycloak troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your keycloak installation:
```bash
kc.sh --version 2>/dev/null || bin/kc.sh --version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review keycloak configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant keycloak configuration:
### Describe the bug

Following this [discussion](https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/discussions/10937), we are experience the problem.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Refresh token rotation with multiple tabs
steps.description:
As far as I can see, nothing is being shared between the tabs apart from the HTTP only cookie on the login endpoint (which only keycloak has control of). Each tab is going to the auth provider login endpoint and getting different id_tokens and refresh_tokens, but for some reason they are still treated as the same session so when one tab request a new token, it invalidates the other trying to get a new one.

Hence why I think this is a bug that needs to be fixed in the keycloak API as it's not

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Refresh token rotation with multiple tabs is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test keycloak to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: As far as I can see, nothing is being shared between the tabs apart from the HTTP only cookie on the login endpoint (which only keycloak has control of).

prerequisites.description: A working keycloak installation or development environment.
